title: Teabloom Stovetop & Microwave Safe Glass Teapot with Removable Tea Infuser for Loose Tea – Includes 2 Blooming Teas – 1.2 L Tea Kettle and Tea Maker
features: Delight your senses with classic design - The Celebration Teapot’s simple, clean lines and perfect proportions blend beautifully with any décor. Constructed of the highest-quality materials for years of enjoyment, this is the tea pot of choice for tea connoisseurs.

Handcrafted, superior quality glass tea maker - Each part of the Celebration Teapot is crafted of high-quality heat-resistant borosilicate glass – making it stovetop, microwave and dishwasher safe. With this premium borosilicate glass tea pot and removable infusers for loose tea all you taste is pure, delicious tea.

Premium features for comfort and convenience – This crystal-clear glass teapot with infuser is strong yet lightweight and ideal for use with blooming teas. We’ve gone the extra mile and added an extra-wide handle and non-drip spout. Generous 1.2 L capacity brews up to four cups of tea.

Includes two blooming teas - The Celebration Teapot comes with two Teabloom jasmine-infused green tea flowers. Ingredients: Green Tea, Marigold Flowers, Rose, Jasmine, Jasmine Flavour. Also perfect for loose-leaf tea, teabags and fruit-infused waters.

A perfect gift for all - This teapot and flowering tea gift set will elevate the tea drinking experience for tea lovers and connoisseurs alike. As a gift for a special person – or yourself! – the Celebration Glass Teapot Set is a tasteful choice that shows how much you care.
description: Teabloom's Celebration Glass Teapot and infuser is made of beautiful crystal-clear hand-blown glass that is also heatproof. The borosilicate glass is as durable as it is lovely. The transparent glass kettle, glass lid and pour spout give you a 360-degree view of the steeping tea within. If you place a Teabloom tea blossom in the pot to steep, you can watch the magic unfold from every angle. All you have to do is add boiling water and watch the jasmine-infused green tea flower bloom while it creates an aromatic and delicious brew right before your eyes. With the Celebration Teapot, you do more than just drink tea, you have a moment. A moment to watch beauty unfold before your eyes. But the teapot also includes a glass infuser if you want to steep loose leaf teas instead. This durable, yet classically designed teapot was created to make your tea drinking moments memorable and relaxing. It is dishwasher safe and can be used on the stovetop or in the microwave or placed in the refrigerator without experiencing thermal shock and cracking like most other glassware. Teabloom's Celebration Teapot is the perfect teapot to pass down from generation to generation providing timeless tea-times as well as memory-making experiences.
